title: ani-gui — Backend Status
history_empty: No entries yet. Watch something to populate ani-hsts.
metadata_cache_description: Wipes the SQLite cache that holds Kitsu search results, anime details, episode lists, and title→id mappings. The ani-cli history file and your settings are not affected.
open_search_link_hint: — find anime by title, browse posters and metadata.
open_test_stream_link_hint: — paste a public HLS URL to verify the streaming proxy + hls.js wiring end-to-end.
